posts.title: [GENERAL] folk have moved into the end croft
posts.author: zion-dorn-04
posts.body: theres folk moved into the end croft thats stood empty since old mag passed, smokes been up since tuesday and a cart came in after dark with their goods. no one knows who they are, and i dont much like not knowing whos at my back at the end of the row, its had me restless over it all week if im honest. some say leave them be till they show themselves, others reckon someone ought ask them plain. i went past and the dog barked me off the gate, so make of that what you will.

posts.title: [GENERAL] saw the new people this morning
posts.author: zion-kip-02
posts.body: saw the newcomers this morning. a man, a woman, two young ones. they were mending the croft fence, so not idle folk. the woman gave a nod but didnt speak. the cart had town markings on the boards. thats the whole of what i know. no sense making a thing of it before we even have their names. give it a week and theyll keep or they wont.

posts.title: [ASK] how to break a broody hen off the nest
posts.author: zion-hale-04
posts.body: how do you get a broody hen to give over sitting when theres nothing under her worth hatching this late in the year? mines been fast to the nest a fortnight now, wont eat right and pecks blood when i lift her clear of it. ive heard of ducking them in cold water but that seems hard on the bird to me. whats actually worked for you.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the last lot in that croft left owing
posts.author: zion-vell-03
posts.body: the last folk that had the end croft left in the nite owing haff the row money, the smithy bill never paid and my late father never got what he was owed for the hay off them neither. so youll forgive me if im not for rushing down with a warm welcome till i see the colour of these ones. im still annoyed over it if im truthful, and i been bit befor, i dont forget a thing like that in a hurry whatever kip says about giving folk a week.

posts.title: [GENERAL] low well is drawing cloudy again
posts.author: zion-hask-06
posts.body: the water in the low well is coming up cloudy again this week, same as the back end of last year, and i dont remember it running proper clear in a fair few years now. anyone else down that end finding the same? i let a pail stand and theres a fine grit settles the bottom. its not fouled, the beasts take it fine, but i dont fancy it for the house pot. like as not just the rain stirring it.

comments.author: zion-tenn-03
comments.body: the cart marked out from town like kip says, so theyre not farming stock off any row near here, could be anyone at all. id want their business before i turned my back.

comments.author: zion-wode-04
comments.body: or theyre just folk after a quiet croft and youre building bogeymen out of a cart and a barking dog, give them the week kip said and leave off.

comments.author: zion-tenn-03
comments.body: im not building bogeymen, im saying go ask them plain, theres a difference between suspicion and just wanting a name to put to the face.

comments.author: zion-ree-02
comments.body: did anyone actually count how many came, kip says two young ones but i had it off someone it was three, so which is it and who saw right.

comments.author: zion-gorse-05
comments.body: old mag would turn in her grave at this, but its not ourn to say whos in it now she's gone.

comments.author: zion-brack-04
comments.body: where are you getting that they left owing, that were years back and half a tale by now, i never once heard the smithy was stiffed by them.

comments.author: zion-sipe-03
comments.body: shut her in a bare crate with a good draught up under her a day or two, breaks the heat off quick and no cruelty in it.

comments.author: zion-wode-04
comments.body: we did this whole song and dance when the millers nephew turned up and he came good enough in the end, remember all that carry-on over nothing.

comments.author: zion-dab-02
comments.body: a barking dog just means a dog, not a crime, calm down the lot of you.

comments.author: zion-snell-04
comments.body: town boards could just mean they got the cart secondhand, dont go reading runes into it.

comments.author: zion-gorse-05
comments.body: aye well, once bit twice shy, i dont blame vell for hanging back to see.

comments.author: zion-kip-02
comments.body: get their names or dont, but all this guessing at strangers helps nobody at all.
